## Skill Name (proposed)

What would this skill be called? (use-kebab-case)

## Display Name

Human-readable name (e.g., "Statistical Reporting")

## Description

One-sentence description of what this skill does.

## Use Case

Describe the academic writing task this skill would help with:

## Target Users

Who would use this skill?
- [ ] Undergraduates
- [ ] Postgraduate students
- [ ] Academic researchers
- [ ] Grant writers
- [ ] Journal editors
- [ ] Other: ___

## Disciplines Covered

Which disciplines would benefit?
- [ ] STEM
- [ ] Social Sciences
- [ ] Humanities
- [ ] Medicine/Health Sciences
- [ ] Engineering
- [ ] Business
- [ ] Law
- [ ] Education

## Example Triggers

What would users type to activate this skill?
1. "..."
2. "..."
3. "..."

## Key Content Areas

What should this skill cover? (bullet points)
-
-
-

## Related Skills

Which existing skills does this relate to or overlap with?

## Why Not an Existing Skill?

Why can't the existing 27 skills cover this use case?

## Priority/Urgency

- [ ] Nice to have
- [ ] Would use regularly
- [ ] Critical for my workflow

## Additional Context

Any reference materials, style guides, or examples that would help build this skill.
